title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Yes Bank Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Yes Bank Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Yes Bank Global Group family as a Risk Analyst in Delhi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Yes Bank Global Group:
Yes Bank Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Yes Bank Global Group!
